text.title: Performance Testing Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example illustrating the methodology against a realistic input.

example.title: Checkout API load test at 500 RPS
example.note: SLO: p95<=300ms, RPS>=500, error<=1%. Baseline at a1b2c3d gave p95=240ms@500RPS. New PR introduces caching. Test type=load, k6 scenario 5-minute ramp + 10-minute steady. Results: p50=110, p95=230, p99=460, RPS=512, error=0.2%. Verdict=pass with regression_pct=-4.2 (improvement). CI green.

example.title: Local-machine apache-bench run quoted as evidence
example.note: Engineer ran `ab -c 100 -n 10000 https://staging/api/x` from laptop; reported p99=80ms. Production p99=520ms under same load. Tree caught both faults: production-like-staging (laptop != staging) and co-corrected-tooling (ab is not CO-corrected).
